reason_for_decision: The revised article now explains clutter as a deployment and signal-separation problem with enough detail and operator relevance to pass.
strengths: It explains why geometry changes the clutter problem, not just the signal processing.
The distinction between clutter, noise, and interference is clearer now.
The article ties clutter back to real usability and detection performance.
summary_assessment: This article passes. It is now a stronger educational piece with better practical grounding.
